requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Safety Testing — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Shipments to Israel
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输安全测试——锂电池运往以色列的强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸安全測試——鋰電池運往以色列的強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies mandatory transport safety testing for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries, including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. A UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation under international transport regulations for lithium battery shipments. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Israel by air or sea must be covered by a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary and must meet the applicable dangerous-goods packaging, marking, labeling, and documentation rules for the selected transport mode.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池的强制运输安全测试，包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包。UN 38.3测试摘要是国际运输法规下锂电池货物的强制文件。从中国经航空或海运出口至以色列的BESS电芯和模组须由有效UN 38.3测试摘要覆盖，并须满足所选运输方式适用的危险货物包装、标记、标签和文件规则。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池的強制運輸安全測試，包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包。UN 38.3測試摘要是國際運輸法規下鋰電池貨物的強制文件。從中國經航空或海運出口至以色列的BESS電芯和模組須由有效UN 38.3測試摘要覆蓋，並須滿足所選運輸方式適用的危險貨物包裝、標記、標籤和文件規則。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
UN Model Regulations — lithium battery test summary, dangerous-goods classification, packaging, marking, labeling, and documentation framework
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and IMDG Code — apply according to air or sea transport mode

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers commonly hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from accredited laboratories for export shipments. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 Test Summary can be acceptable for Israel-bound shipments if it covers the exact cell or battery type, chemistry, capacity, and configuration being shipped and remains current after any design changes. China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 do not replace UN 38.3 transport documentation.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商通常持有认可实验室为出口货物出具的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。来自中国的UN 38.3测试摘要如覆盖所运输的确切电芯或电池类型、化学体系、容量和配置，并在任何设计变更后保持有效，可用于运往以色列的货物。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016不能替代UN 38.3运输文件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商通常持有認可實驗室為出口貨物出具的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。來自中國的UN 38.3測試摘要如覆蓋所運輸的確切電芯或電池類型、化學體系、容量和配置，並在任何設計變更後保持有效，可用於運往以色列的貨物。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016不能替代UN 38.3運輸文件。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from accredited Chinese laboratories — acceptable for international transport if the summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped
GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 — technical standards that do not replace transport dangerous-goods documentation

gap.en: The transport gap is document scope, current validity, and dangerous-goods execution rather than national standard equivalence. Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 Test Summary covers the specific cell, module, or pack shipped to Israel; (b) design changes since testing do not invalidate the summary; (c) the shipment is correctly classified, packed, marked, labeled, and documented under IATA or IMDG requirements; and (d) the Israeli importer, freight forwarder, airline, shipping line, and port agent accept the documentation before dispatch.
gap.zh: 运输差距在于文件范围、当前有效性和危险货物执行，而不是国家标准等效性。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要覆盖运往以色列的特定电芯、模组或电池包；（b）测试后的设计变更不会使摘要失效；（c）货物按IATA或IMDG要求正确分类、包装、标记、贴标和制单；（d）以色列进口商、货代、航空公司、船公司和港口代理在发运前接受相关文件。
gap.zht: 運輸差距在於文件範圍、當前有效性和危險貨物執行，而不是國家標準等效性。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要覆蓋運往以色列的特定電芯、模組或電池包；（b）測試後的設計變更不會使摘要失效；（c）貨物按IATA或IMDG要求正確分類、包裝、標記、貼標和製單；（d）以色列進口商、貨代、航空公司、船公司和港口代理在發運前接受相關文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international dangerous-goods transport rules for lithium battery shipments to Israel by air or sea
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is mandatory for lithium BESS cells, modules, and packs shipped from China to Israel. Chinese-origin UN 38.3 summaries can be used when they cover the exact shipped configuration and remain current, but China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 do not replace dangerous-goods transport documentation. Confirm classification, packaging, marking, labeling, and acceptance with the freight chain before dispatch.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国运往以色列的锂电BESS电芯、模组和电池包必须满足UN 38.3运输合规。来自中国的UN 38.3摘要如覆盖确切出货配置且保持有效，可以使用；但中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016不能替代危险货物运输文件。发运前请与运输链确认分类、包装、标记、贴标和文件接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國運往以色列的鋰電BESS電芯、模組和電池包必須滿足UN 38.3運輸合規。來自中國的UN 38.3摘要如覆蓋確切出貨配置且保持有效，可以使用；但中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016不能替代危險貨物運輸文件。發運前請與運輸鏈確認分類、包裝、標記、貼標和文件接受情況。
